"Owner" : currentStaffName || e(902) }; sales.push(u); LS[e(466)](getBranchKey(e(1200)), sales); render(); await sbInsert(e(1265), { id: u.id, date: u[e(1088)], product: u.product, qty_sold: u[e(315)], selling_price: u[e(583)], discount: u[e(473)], total_sale: u[e(587)], payment_method: u[e(709)], amount_paid: u[e(1101)], change: u[e(279)], recorded_by: u.recordedBy, customer: u[e(663)] || "" }); // Temporarily add unit note to product for receipt display only if (saleUnitNote) { var receiptRecord = Object.assign({}, u, { product: u.product + " [" + saleUnitNote + "]" }); showReceipt(receiptRecord); } else { showReceipt(u); } } ); // Patch qty/sell/discount oninput so bales/dozens trigger correct total calc setTimeout(function() { var qtyEl = document.getElementById("f-qty"); var sellEl = document.getElementById(a0_0x12f7eb(362)); var discEl = document.getElementById(a0_0x12f7eb(309)); if (qtyEl) qtyEl.setAttribute("oninput", "ctSaleCalc()"); if (sellEl) sellEl.setAttribute("oninput", "ctSaleCalc()"); if (discEl) discEl.setAttribute("oninput", "ctSaleCalc()"); var fSaleConv = document.getElementById("f-sale-conv"); if (fSaleConv) fSaleConv.setAttribute("oninput", "ctSaleCalc()"); // Tag the selling price label so ctUpdateSaleUnit can relabel it if (sellEl && sellEl.previousElementSibling && sellEl.previousElementSibling.tagName === "LABEL") { sellEl.previousElementSibling.id = "ct-sale-sell-label"; } else if (sellEl) { // walk up to form-group, find first label var fg = sellEl.closest ? sellEl.closest(".form-group") : sellEl.parentElement; if (fg) { var lbl = fg.querySelector("label"); if (lbl && !lbl.id) lbl.id = "ct-sale-sell-label"; } } // Also tag the qty label if (qtyEl) { var qfg = qtyEl.closest ? qtyEl.closest(".form-group") : qtyEl.parentElement; if (qfg) { var qlbl = qfg.querySelector("label"); if (qlbl && !qlbl.id) qlbl.id = "ct-sale-qty-label"; } } }, 50); } function ctUpdateSaleUnit() { var unit = (document.getElementById("f-sale-unit") || {}).value || "pieces"; var convWrap = document.getElementById("ct-sale-conv-wrap"); var convLabel = document.getElementById("ct-sale-conv-label"); // Update sell price label dynamically var saleSellLabel = document.getElementById("ct-sale-sell-label"); if (unit === "bales") { convWrap.style.display = ""; convLabel.textContent = "Pieces per Bale"; if (saleSellLabel) saleSellLabel.textContent = "Selling Price (per bale)"; var baleConv = document.getElementById("f-sale-conv"); if (baleConv) { baleConv.readOnly = false; baleConv.value = ""; baleConv.placeholder = "e.g. 144"; } } else if (unit === "dozens") { convWrap.style.display = ""; convLabel.textContent = "Dozens (1 dozen = 12 pcs)"; if (saleSellLabel) saleSellLabel.textContent = "Selling Price (per dozen)"; document.getElementById("f-sale-conv").value = 12; document.getElementById("f-sale-conv").readOnly = true; } else { convWrap.style.display = "none"; if (saleSellLabel) saleSellLabel.textContent = "Selling Price (per piece)"; } ctSaleCalc(); } function ctSaleCalc() { var saleUnitEl = document.getElementById("f-sale-unit"); if (!saleUnitEl) { calcSale(); return; } // original modal — let original handle it var unit = saleUnitEl.value || "pieces"; var qty = +(document.getElementById("f-qty") || {}).value || 0; var convEl = document.getElementById("f-sale-conv"); var conv = convEl ? (+convEl.value || 1) : 1; var piecesPerUnit = (unit === "bales") ? conv : (unit === "dozens") ? 12 : 1; var total = Math.round(qty * piecesPerUnit); // Update hint var hint = document.getElementById("ct-sale-pieces-hint"); if (hint) { if (total > 0) { hint.style.display = ""; hint.textContent = "= " + fmtN(qty) + " " + unit + " deducted from stock"; } else { hint.style.display = "none"; } } if (unit === "pieces") { // Pieces: let the original calcSale() handle everything (per-piece logic) calcSale(); } else { // Dozens / Bales: price is per unit (dozen or bale), NOT per piece // Total = qty * sellP (e.g. 5 dozens x 50,000 = 250,000) var sellEl = document.getElementById(a0_0x12f7eb(362)); var discEl = document.getElementById(a0_0x12f7eb(309)); var sellP = sellEl ? (+sellEl.value || 0) : 0; var discount = discEl ? (+discEl.value || 0) : 0; var saleTotal = (sellP - discount) * qty; // Update the total display (try common IDs used by calcSale) var totalEl = document.getElementById("f-total"); if (totalEl) totalEl.textContent = fmt(saleTotal); // Update change var paidEl = document.getElementById("f-paid"); var changeEl = document.getElementById("f-change"); if (paidEl && changeEl) { var paid = +paidEl.value || 0; changeEl.textContent = paid > 0 ? fmt(paid - saleTotal) : "—"; } } } function ctUpdatePOUnit(sel){ var row=sel.parentElement; var convEl=row.querySelector('input[placeholder="Pcs/Bale"]'); if(!convEl) return; if(sel.value==="bales"){ convEl.style.display=""; convEl.placeholder="Pcs/Bale"; convEl.readOnly=false; } else { convEl.style.display="none"; } calcPOTotal(); } // ─── END BALES / DOZENS / PIECES FEATURE ─────────────────────────────────────
